name: paralegals in small law firms processing 5–15 case filings/month tool
description: For paralegals in small law firms processing 5–15 case filings/month, overdue filings cause client dissatisfaction. We automate tracking and flagging instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
target_audience: paralegals in small law firms processing 5–15 case filings/month
problem_solved: Overdue legal case filings leading to potential penalties and client dissatisfaction.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Overdue legal case filings leading to potential penalties and client dissatisfaction.
